errors.validation.name_too_short: Recipe name must be at least 1 character
errors.validation.difficulty_invalid: Difficulty must be EASY, MEDIUM, or HARD
errors.validation.ingredients_required: At least one ingredient is required
errors.validation.instructions_required: At least one instruction is required
errors.validation.prep_time_invalid: Prep time must be a non-negative number
errors.validation.cook_time_invalid: Cook time must be a non-negative number
errors.validation.image_invalid: Image must be a valid URL
errors.validation.page_invalid: Page must be a positive integer
errors.validation.page_size_invalid: Page size must be between 1 and 100
errors.not_found.pending_registration: No pending registration was found for this email. Please start over.
errors.validation.code_expired: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.validation.code_attempts_exceeded: Too many incorrect attempts. Please request a new code.
errors.conflict.email_exists: A user with this email already exists
errors.conflict.recipe_exists: A recipe with this source URL already exists
errors.too_many_requests.code_cooldown: Please wait a moment before requesting another code.
errors.too_many_requests.ai_cooldown: Too many AI requests — please slow down and try again in a minute.
errors.ai.upstream_failed: The AI provider could not generate a recipe right now. Please try again.
errors.ai.invalid_response: The AI returned an unexpected response. Please try again.
errors.ai.provider_not_configured: The configured AI provider is not available.
errors.ai.prompt_rejected: Your prompt was flagged as inappropriate. Please rephrase and try again.
auth.register_code_sent: We sent a 6-digit verification code to your email.
auth.register_code_resent: A new verification code has been sent.
auth.verification_email_intro: Use this code to finish creating your Recipely account:
auth.verification_email_expiry: This code expires in 3 minutes. If you didn't request it, ignore this email.
auth.forgot_password_sent: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a password reset link.
auth.password_reset_success: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.reset_email_intro: We received a request to reset your Recipely password. Tap the button below to choose a new one:
auth.reset_email_expiry: This link expires in 1 hour. If you didn't request it, you can safely ignore this email.
errors.not_found.reset_token: This password reset link is invalid.
errors.validation.token_expired: This password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.validation.token_already_used: This password reset link has already been used.
errors.validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
